summary: Iteration 5 — P0 verification of (A) MediaPicker dialog stacking fix and (B) premium mobile-first StoreLanding UI. ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASS. (A) Login as org_admin admin@example.com/admin123 → /dashboard/landings (1 'Configura' button for 'QA Demo Store') → editor dialog opens (data-testid='landing-enabled-toggle'). Toggled landing_enabled ON, filled landing-title-input='STACKING_TEST_TITLE', clicked landing-hero-browse-btn → MediaPicker (data-testid='media-picker-dialog') opened with 2 seeded items (media-item-qa-test/demo-banner, media-item-qa-test/hero-promo). Clicked media-pick-qa-test/hero-promo. CRITICAL ASSERTIONS: picker closed (true), editor STAYED OPEN (true), title field retained 'STACKING_TEST_TITLE' (form state preserved), hero src updated to the picked Cloudinary URL, toast 'Immagine selezionata' visible. Saved → PUT /api/stores/6a383aa59bbc459260a5f6e7 → 200 OK. Stacking bug confirmed FIXED. (B) Public /s/windtre-castelnuovo-del-garda on mobile viewport 414×900: store-landing-root present, exactly 1 store-landing-whatsapp-btn (no duplicates), hero image overlay with title 'WINDTRE Castelnuovo del Garda', 3 info cards present (review-btn, maps-btn, hours), WhatsApp CTA has gradient + shadow classes, href=https://wa.me/393280878580. Analytics: 4/4 events fired correctly to POST /api/analytics — store_landing_view (~1s after load), store_landing_review_click (opens https://www.google.com/maps/place/…), store_landing_maps_click (opens https://www.google.com/maps?q=…), store_landing_whatsapp_click (opens https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=393280878580…). (C) Backend: GET /api/store-landing/windtre-castelnuovo-del-garda → 200 with all expected fields (landing_title, landing_hero_image present, landing_cta_mode='whatsapp', whatsapp='https://wa.me/393280878580', organization.name='Consulente | WINDTRE Partner'). GET /api/store-landing/nonexistent-slug-zzz-no → 404.
critical_code_review_comments: MediaPicker.js line 51 + Landings.js line 185 — the fix is robust: `modal={true}` on the nested picker pairs with the parent `onOpenChange` guard `if (!o && pickerOpen) return;`. The setTimeout(0) deferral on picker close in onSelect (Landings.js line 457) ensures formData commit before Radix unmount-side-effects fire. Solid pattern — consider documenting in a frontend/ARCHITECTURE.md so future nested dialogs (e.g. media picker inside Posts or Vendors editor) reuse it.

Public /s/ subtitle is rendered conditionally: when landing_subtitle='' the

is correctly skipped (verified — WINDTRE store has empty subtitle in DB, UI renders only title + 'Risposta in pochi minuti negli orari di apertura' helper line). No bug.

Console emits 2× 401 on the public landing page (likely SPA-shell calling /api/auth/me before route detects it is public). Not user-visible, but consider gating /api/auth/me with a `silent` mode or skipping it on /s/* routes to keep the network panel clean.

Landings.js (615 lines) — close to the 700-line guidance threshold. Consider extracting <FormSection>, <CtaPickButton>, <CheckboxRow>, <EmptyState>, <CardGrid> helpers (already in-file) into /components/landings/*.js when next iteration adds more fields.

Editor form retains optimistic state across MediaPicker open/close, but there is no 'unsaved changes' guard if the user closes via the X (DialogClose) — losing the just-picked image and title silently. Low priority but consider a beforeUnload-style confirmation when formData diverges from editing snapshot.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (MediaPicker stacking fix + premium StoreLanding UI + 4/4 analytics events all PASS)

test_credentials: Org admin verified working: admin@example.com / admin123 (org_id=6a383aa59bbc459260a5f6e6, store_id=6a383aa59bbc459260a5f6e7 'QA Demo Store', 2 seeded MediaPicker items qa-test/demo-banner + qa-test/hero-promo). Public slug: windtre-castelnuovo-del-garda (store_id=6a0c72befbb39d92c9f5edbf).
seed_data_creation: None. Used the pre-seeded QA Test Org store + 2 media items. The save PUT call persisted landing_enabled=true + landing_title='STACKING_TEST_TITLE' + landing_hero_image=Cloudinary URL on the QA Demo Store — main agent may want to reset these via a manual PUT or re-run the seed if subsequent tests assume default state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix verified end-to-end. Critical e2e flow recorded: (1) /login → admin@example.com/admin123 → (2) goto /dashboard/landings → (3) click first 'Configura' button → (4) toggle data-testid=landing-enabled-toggle ON → (5) fill landing-title-input → (6) click landing-hero-browse-btn → (7) wait for media-picker-dialog → (8) click first media-pick-* via el.evaluate('el=>el.click()') (hover-only Tailwind class makes it invisible to direct .click()) → (9) assert media-picker-dialog gone AND landing-enabled-toggle still present AND landing-title-input retains value AND landing-hero-preview img src updated → (10) click landing-save-btn → PUT /api/stores/{id} 200. The QA Demo Store will now show as 'Attive' on next /dashboard/landings load — if you need 'Non attive' state for a subsequent test, PUT landing_enabled=false first. Public landing data captured during test (analytics POSTs to /api/analytics): 4 event types fire correctly — view, review_click, maps_click, whatsapp_click.
rca of the issue: No issues. The previous fix (Radix `modal={true}` on the nested MediaPicker + parent Landings dialog `onOpenChange` guard via `pickerOpen` state + setTimeout(0) deferred picker close in onSelect) is working as designed. The classic Radix focus-trap stacking issue — where opening a nested Dialog cascades onOpenChange(false) into the parent — is mitigated by the modal=true backdrop layering AND the explicit `if (!o && pickerOpen) return;` guard on the parent, with the deferred setPickerOpen(false) ensuring formData commits before the picker unmounts. Test simulated the exact failure scenario (open editor → open picker → click 'Usa' on a media item) and confirmed editor stays open, form state retained, hero image preview updated, and subsequent save PUT 200s.
